Steps23
Final steps for Best UI
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one
How to run

Upload the file

In AWS CloudShell:

Actions
→ Upload file
→ opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one.sh

Confirm:

cd ~

ls -lh ~/opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one.sh
Run one command
chmod +x ~/opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one.sh

bash ~/opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one.sh

Keep CloudShell open until the complete process finishes. It performs several Amplify deployments internally.





Below is the one command copy in file and rename as opsai_steps20_to_final_all_in_one







#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
export AWS_PAGER=""

PROJECT_DIR="$HOME/opsai-assistant-aws"
ENV_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/.env"
TEMP_DIR=""

show_error() {
  local line_number="$1"
  local exit_code="$2"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo "ERROR: OpsAI final UI installation stopped."
  echo "Line: $line_number"
  echo "Exit code: $exit_code"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo
  echo "The project backups created by the embedded scripts were retained."
}

trap 'show_error "$LINENO" "$?"' ERR

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${TEMP_DIR:-}" && -d "$TEMP_DIR" ]]; then
    rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "============================================================"
echo " OpsAI Steps 20 to Final - One-File UI Installation"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Run this only after completing Steps 1 through 19."
echo
echo "This single file installs:"
echo "  1. Complete Internal HR Portal"
echo "  2. Candidate and Manager views"
echo "  3. 10 managers, 20 jobs, 40 candidates and applications"
echo "  4. All 17 hiring stages"
echo "  5. Final theme, robot and AI illustrations"
echo "  6. Home feature cards and thinking indicator"
echo "  7. Right-side globe"
echo "  8. Fixed HR quick buttons"
echo "  9. 30-VM GTO Infrastructure Assets dashboard"
echo " 10. Patching, vulnerability, CVE, reboot and health views"
echo " 11. GTO approval workflow"
echo " 12. Final AWS Amplify deployment and validation"
echo

if [[ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Project directory was not found:"
  echo "  $PROJECT_DIR"
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Environment file was not found:"
  echo "  $ENV_FILE"
  exit 1
fi

for command_name in \
  aws \
  bash \
  base64 \
  curl \
  grep \
  node \
  python3 \
  sha256sum \
  unzip \
  zip
do
  if ! command -v "$command_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: Required command is not available: $command_name"
    exit 1
  fi
done

echo "Checking the current AWS identity..."
aws sts get-caller-identity --output table

set -a
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-$AWS_REGION}"
AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME="${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME:-main}"

export AWS_REGION
export AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
export AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME

echo
echo "Project: $PROJECT_DIR"
echo "Region:  $AWS_REGION"
echo

TEMP_DIR="$(mktemp -d "$HOME/.opsai-final-ui.XXXXXX")"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR"

echo "Preparing embedded scripts..."

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_UI_PAYLOAD_01_EOF'

OPSAI_UI_PAYLOAD_01_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="9d04f087faa2fd2de4f9b8c5df702101c1d856a6922d90e3415c7b8bc1d18225"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh"
echo "Validated: 01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_UI_PAYLOAD_02_EOF'

OPSAI_UI_PAYLOAD_02_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="7f497a3c1d54a9991cc2e804f00ed191c522744ba087fb77ced9cb50e6dd730b"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh"
echo "Validated: 02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh"

echo
echo "All embedded files passed syntax and integrity checks."

run_phase() {
  local phase_number="$1"
  local phase_title="$2"
  local script_name="$3"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo " Phase ${phase_number} of 2"
  echo " ${phase_title}"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo

  bash "$TEMP_DIR/$script_name"

  echo
  echo "Phase ${phase_number} completed successfully."
}

# Install the complete HR and final visual UI first.
run_phase \
  "1" \
  "Complete HR Portal and final OpsAI visual UI" \
  "01_step22_complete_final_ui.sh"

# Apply the latest GTO dashboard last so the 30-VM dashboard remains final.
run_phase \
  "2" \
  "Final GTO infrastructure and approval dashboards" \
  "02_step20_gto_infrastructure_dashboard.sh"

echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " Final combined validation"
echo "============================================================"
echo

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
WEB_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/app/web"

required_files=(
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
  "$WEB_DIR/app.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/styles.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-robot.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-ai-orb.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-infrastructure.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-hr-team.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-approvals.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-globe-photo.png"
)

for required_file in "${required_files[@]}"; do
  if [[ ! -s "$required_file" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Missing or empty final file:"
    echo "  $required_file"
    exit 1
  fi
done

node --check "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"

ASSET_COUNT="$(grep -c "^    asset(" "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js")"

if [[ "$ASSET_COUNT" -ne 30 ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Expected 30 GTO assets, found $ASSET_COUNT."
  exit 1
fi

grep -q "GTO – Global Technology Operations" \
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"

grep -q "Infrastructure Assets" \
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"

grep -q "Critical Vulnerability" \
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"

grep -q "Candidate View" \
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "Manager View" \
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "NEXT TECHNICAL ROUND" \
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "OFFER RELEASED" \
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "OpsAI is thinking" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"

grep -q "opsai-globe-photo.png" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"

grep -q "openDevOpsJobs" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"

grep -q "openDevOpsCandidates" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"

if grep -qE \
  'opsai-world-map\.(css|js)|assets/opsai-world-map\.svg' \
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
then
  echo "ERROR: An old world-map reference is still present."
  exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "${AMPLIFY_APP_ID:-}" ]]; then
  AMPLIFY_APP_ID="$(aws amplify list-apps \
    --region "$AWS_REGION" \
    --query "apps[?name=='opsai-assistant-ui'].appId | [0]" \
    --output text)"
fi

if [[ -z "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" || "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" == "None" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Amplify application ID could not be resolved."
  exit 1
fi

DEFAULT_DOMAIN="$(aws amplify get-app \
  --app-id "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" \
  --region "$AWS_REGION" \
  --query 'app.defaultDomain' \
  --output text)"

FINAL_URL="https://${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME}.${DEFAULT_DOMAIN}"

LATEST_JOB_STATUS="$(aws amplify list-jobs \
  --app-id "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" \
  --branch-name "$AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME" \
  --region "$AWS_REGION" \
  --max-results 1 \
  --query 'jobSummaries[0].status' \
  --output text)"

if [[ "$LATEST_JOB_STATUS" != "SUCCEED" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: The latest Amplify deployment was not successful."
  echo "Latest status: $LATEST_JOB_STATUS"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Final combined validation passed."
echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " OpsAI Steps 20 to Final completed successfully"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Final configuration:"
echo "  GTO sample VMs:        30"
echo "  Hiring managers:       10"
echo "  Job requisitions:      20"
echo "  Candidate profiles:    40"
echo "  Sample applications:   40"
echo "  Hiring stages:         17"
echo "  Right-side globe:      Enabled"
echo "  HR quick buttons:      Fixed"
echo "  Infrastructure view:   Enabled"
echo "  Approval workflow:     Enabled"
echo
echo "Final website:"
echo "  $FINAL_URL"
echo
echo "Open the website in Incognito or press Ctrl + Shift + R."
